topic: My windshield is covered in bugs and dust each morning as if I drove all night, and the odometer agrees.
title: My Car Drives Itself While I Sleep | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning my windshield was caked with bugs, like I had driven all night.
scenes.image_prompt: close composition of a car windshield smeared with dead insects and road dust at dawn, dim grey light, suburban driveway, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live in a quiet town. I park in my own driveway.
scenes.image_prompt: a small sedan parked in a narrow residential driveway, early morning fog, dim streetlight, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
a dark empty garage interior with a single car, faint moonlight through a window, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One Tuesday the dust on the hood was thick, and the dawn felt wrong.
scenes.image_prompt: a car hood coated in fine pale dust under weak morning sun, suburban street, hazy atmosphere, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So I wrote down the odometer.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand pointing at a dashboard odometer reading in dim cabin light, blurred steering wheel, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning it had climbed two hundred miles. The seat was still warm.
scenes.image_prompt: a worn driver seat in a dark car interior, faint dashboard glow, condensation on windows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I hid my keys in a drawer that night.
scenes.image_prompt: a set of car keys lying inside an open wooden drawer, single lamp, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The keys were back in the ignition by sunrise.
scenes.image_prompt: a car ignition with keys inserted, dim cabin, soft dawn light through windshield, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The bugs got bigger. Mud now. Then long strands of someone else's hair.
scenes.image_prompt: a windshield wiper tangled with dark hair strands and mud, overcast light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning the passenger seat was reclined, and it smelled of someone.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty reclined passenger seat in a dark car, faint indentation in the cushion, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sold the car. The buyer called me weeks later, terrified.
scenes.image_prompt: a used car on a gravel lot at dusk, faded for sale sign, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He asked who kept leaving notes that said, please stop locking the doors.
scenes.image_prompt: a folded handwritten note tucked under a windshield wiper, dim grey morning, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
